mapper.select:
WITH FLOW AS ( SELECT A.FACTORY_CODE, A.PRODPLAN_DATE, A.PRODPLAN_SEQ, A.PRODWORK_SEQ, A.WORK_SEQ, A.WORKDT_DATE, A.WORK_CODE, A.ITEM_CODE, A.PROD_CODE, A.PROD_QTY AS ORDER_QTY, M.ITEM_LOT_NO AS LOT_NO, PITEM.MATERIAL_CODE AS ITEM_MATERIAL_CODE, PITEM.MATERIAL_NAME AS ITEM_MATERIAL_NAME, PITEM.MATERIAL_SPEC AS ITEM_MATERIAL_SPEC, PROD.MATERIAL_CODE AS PROD_MATERIAL_CODE, PROD.MATERIAL_NAME AS PROD_MATERIAL_NAME, PROD.MATERIAL_SPEC AS PROD_MATERIAL_SPEC, W.WORK_NAME, PH.WORK_ORDER, PH.WORK_ORDER_NM, PD.SEQ AS FLOW_SEQ, PD.WORK_SEQ AS FLOW_WORK_SEQ FROM TPR504 A LEFT JOIN TPR301M M ON A.FACTORY_CODE = M.FACTORY_CODE AND A.PRODPLAN_DATE = M.PRODPLAN_DATE AND A.PRODPLAN_SEQ = M.PRODPLAN_SEQ LEFT JOIN TCO403 PITEM ON A.ITEM_CODE = PITEM.MATERIAL_ID LEFT JOIN TCO403 PROD ON A.PROD_CODE = PROD.MATERIAL_ID LEFT JOIN TPR102 W ON A.FACTORY_CODE = W.FACTORY_CODE AND A.WORK_CODE = W.WORK_CODE LEFT JOIN TPR112 PF ON A.ITEM_CODE = PF.PROD_CODE_ID LEFT JOIN TPR110 PH ON PF.WORK_ORDER = PH.WORK_ORDER LEFT JOIN TPR110D PD ON PH.WORK_ORDER = PD.WORK_ORDER AND A.WORK_CODE = PD.WORK_CODE ), PREV_SEQ AS ( SELECT F.FACTORY_CODE, F.PRODPLAN_DATE, F.PRODPLAN_SEQ, F.PRODWORK_SEQ, F.WORK_SEQ, F.WORK_CODE, F.WORK_ORDER, F.FLOW_SEQ, ( SELECT MAX(D.SEQ) FROM TPR110D D WHERE D.WORK_ORDER = F.WORK_ORDER AND D.SEQ < F.FLOW_SEQ ) AS PREV_SEQ FROM FLOW F ), PREV_FLOW AS ( SELECT P.FACTORY_CODE, P.PRODPLAN_DATE, P.PRODPLAN_SEQ, P.PRODWORK_SEQ, P.WORK_SEQ, D.SEQ AS PREV_SEQ, D.WORK_CODE AS PREV_WORK_CODE, D.WORK_SEQ AS PREV_WORK_SEQ FROM PREV_SEQ P LEFT JOIN TPR110D D ON P.WORK_ORDER = D.WORK_ORDER AND P.PREV_SEQ = D.SEQ ), RESULT_SUM AS ( SELECT FACTORY_CODE, PRODPLAN_DATE, PRODPLAN_SEQ, PRODWORK_SEQ, WORK_SEQ, SUM(ISNULL(PROD_QTY, 0)) AS PROD_QTY, SUM(ISNULL(GOOD_QTY, 0)) AS GOOD_QTY, SUM(ISNULL(BAD_QTY, 0)) AS BAD_QTY FROM TPR601 GROUP BY FACTORY_CODE, PRODPLAN_DATE, PRODPLAN_SEQ, PRODWORK_SEQ, WORK_SEQ ), FLOW_TEXT AS ( SELECT X.FACTORY_CODE, X.WORK_ORDER, STUFF(( SELECT ' > ' + ISNULL(W.WORK_NAME, D2.WORK_CODE) FROM TPR110D D2 LEFT JOIN TPR102 W ON D2.WORK_CODE = W.WORK_CODE AND W.FACTORY_CODE = X.FACTORY_CODE WHERE D2.WORK_ORDER = X.WORK_ORDER ORDER BY D2.SEQ FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'varchar(max)'), 1, 3, '') AS PROCESS_FLOW FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT FACTORY_CODE, WORK_ORDER FROM FLOW ) X ) SELECT F.LOT_NO, F.FACTORY_CODE, F.PRODPLAN_DATE, F.PRODPLAN_SEQ, F.PRODWORK_SEQ, F.WORK_SEQ, F.WORKDT_DATE, F.WORK_CODE, F.WORK_NAME, F.ITEM_CODE, F.ITEM_MATERIAL_CODE AS ITEM_CODE_NM, F.ITEM_MATERIAL_NAME AS ITEM_NAME, F.ITEM_MATERIAL_SPEC AS ITEM_SPEC, F.PROD_CODE, F.PROD_MATERIAL_CODE AS PROD_ITEM_CODE, F.PROD_MATERIAL_NAME AS PROD_ITEM_NAME, F.PROD_MATERIAL_SPEC AS PROD_ITEM_SPEC, F.WORK_ORDER_NM, FT.PROCESS_FLOW AS PROCESS_FLOW, ISNULL(PF.PREV_WORK_CODE, '') AS PREV_WORK_CODE, ISNULL(PREV_R.PROD_QTY, 0) AS PREV_PROD_QTY, ISNULL(CURR_R.PROD_QTY, 0) AS CURR_PROD_QTY, CASE WHEN PF.PREV_SEQ IS NULL THEN ISNULL(F.ORDER_QTY, 0) - ISNULL(CURR_R.PROD_QTY, 0) ELSE ISNULL(PREV_R.PROD_QTY, 0) - ISNULL(CURR_R.PROD_QTY, 0) END AS WIP_QTY FROM FLOW F LEFT JOIN PREV_FLOW PF ON F.FACTORY_CODE = PF.FACTORY_CODE AND F.PRODPLAN_DATE = PF.PRODPLAN_DATE AND F.PRODPLAN_SEQ = PF.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND F.PRODWORK_SEQ = PF.PRODWORK_SEQ AND F.WORK_SEQ = PF.WORK_SEQ LEFT JOIN RESULT_SUM CURR_R ON F.FACTORY_CODE = CURR_R.FACTORY_CODE AND F.PRODPLAN_DATE = CURR_R.PRODPLAN_DATE AND F.PRODPLAN_SEQ = CURR_R.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND F.PRODWORK_SEQ = CURR_R.PRODWORK_SEQ AND CAST(F.WORK_SEQ AS INT) = CURR_R.WORK_SEQ LEFT JOIN RESULT_SUM PREV_R ON F.FACTORY_CODE = PREV_R.FACTORY_CODE AND F.PRODPLAN_DATE = PREV_R.PRODPLAN_DATE AND F.PRODPLAN_SEQ = PREV_R.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND F.PRODWORK_SEQ = PREV_R.PRODWORK_SEQ AND CAST(PF.PREV_WORK_SEQ AS INT) = PREV_R.WORK_SEQ LEFT JOIN FLOW_TEXT FT ON F.FACTORY_CODE = FT.FACTORY_CODE AND F.WORK_ORDER = FT.WORK_ORDER
AND F.WORKDT_DATE = REPLACE(#{searchDate}, '-', '')
AND F.WORK_CODE = #{workCode}
AND ( F.PROD_MATERIAL_CODE LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' OR F.PROD_MATERIAL_NAME LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' OR F.LOT_NO LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' )
ORDER BY F.PRODPLAN_DATE, CAST(F.PRODPLAN_SEQ AS INT), CAST(F.PRODWORK_SEQ AS INT), CAST(F.WORK_SEQ AS INT), F.WORKDT_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

WITH FLOW AS ( SELECT A.FACTORY_CODE, A.PRODPLAN_DATE, A.PRODPLAN_SEQ, A.PRODWORK_SEQ, A.WORK_SEQ, A.WORKDT_DATE, A.WORK_CODE, A.ITEM_CODE, A.PROD_CODE, A.PROD_QTY AS ORDER_QTY, M.ITEM_LOT_NO AS LOT_NO, PROD.MATERIAL_CODE AS PROD_MATERIAL_CODE, PROD.MATERIAL_NAME AS PROD_MATERIAL_NAME, PH.WORK_ORDER, PD.SEQ AS FLOW_SEQ FROM TPR504 A LEFT JOIN TPR301M M ON A.FACTORY_CODE = M.FACTORY_CODE AND A.PRODPLAN_DATE = M.PRODPLAN_DATE AND A.PRODPLAN_SEQ = M.PRODPLAN_SEQ LEFT JOIN TCO403 PROD ON A.PROD_CODE = PROD.MATERIAL_ID LEFT JOIN TPR112 PF ON A.ITEM_CODE = PF.PROD_CODE_ID LEFT JOIN TPR110 PH ON PF.WORK_ORDER = PH.WORK_ORDER LEFT JOIN TPR110D PD ON PH.WORK_ORDER = PD.WORK_ORDER AND A.WORK_CODE = PD.WORK_CODE ), PREV_SEQ AS ( SELECT F.FACTORY_CODE, F.PRODPLAN_DATE, F.PRODPLAN_SEQ, F.PRODWORK_SEQ, F.WORK_SEQ, F.WORK_ORDER, F.FLOW_SEQ, ( SELECT MAX(D.SEQ) FROM TPR110D D WHERE D.WORK_ORDER = F.WORK_ORDER AND D.SEQ < F.FLOW_SEQ ) AS PREV_SEQ FROM FLOW F ), PREV_FLOW AS ( SELECT P.FACTORY_CODE, P.PRODPLAN_DATE, P.PRODPLAN_SEQ, P.PRODWORK_SEQ, P.WORK_SEQ, D.WORK_SEQ AS PREV_WORK_SEQ, D.SEQ AS PREV_SEQ FROM PREV_SEQ P LEFT JOIN TPR110D D ON P.WORK_ORDER = D.WORK_ORDER AND P.PREV_SEQ = D.SEQ ), RESULT_SUM AS ( SELECT FACTORY_CODE, PRODPLAN_DATE, PRODPLAN_SEQ, PRODWORK_SEQ, WORK_SEQ, SUM(ISNULL(PROD_QTY, 0)) AS PROD_QTY FROM TPR601 GROUP BY FACTORY_CODE, PRODPLAN_DATE, PRODPLAN_SEQ, PRODWORK_SEQ, WORK_SEQ ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FLOW F LEFT JOIN PREV_FLOW PF ON F.FACTORY_CODE = PF.FACTORY_CODE AND F.PRODPLAN_DATE = PF.PRODPLAN_DATE AND F.PRODPLAN_SEQ = PF.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND F.PRODWORK_SEQ = PF.PRODWORK_SEQ AND F.WORK_SEQ = PF.WORK_SEQ LEFT JOIN RESULT_SUM CURR_R ON F.FACTORY_CODE = CURR_R.FACTORY_CODE AND F.PRODPLAN_DATE = CURR_R.PRODPLAN_DATE AND F.PRODPLAN_SEQ = CURR_R.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND F.PRODWORK_SEQ = CURR_R.PRODWORK_SEQ AND CAST(F.WORK_SEQ AS INT) = CURR_R.WORK_SEQ LEFT JOIN RESULT_SUM PREV_R ON F.FACTORY_CODE = PREV_R.FACTORY_CODE AND F.PRODPLAN_DATE = PREV_R.PRODPLAN_DATE AND F.PRODPLAN_SEQ = PREV_R.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND F.PRODWORK_SEQ = PREV_R.PRODWORK_SEQ AND CAST(PF.PREV_WORK_SEQ AS INT) = PREV_R.WORK_SEQ
AND F.WORKDT_DATE = REPLACE(#{searchDate}, '-', '')
AND F.WORK_CODE = #{workCode}
AND ( F.PROD_MATERIAL_CODE LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' OR F.PROD_MATERIAL_NAME LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' OR F.LOT_NO LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' )
